title: Baxter India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Baxter India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Baxter India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Baxter India:
Baxter India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baxter India!
